Item Class: Crossbows
Rarity: Rare
Oblivion Core
Trarthan Cannon
--------
Physical Damage: 61-140 (augmented)
Lightning Damage: 3-43 (lightning)
Critical Hit Chance: 5.00%
Attacks per Second: 1.40
--------
Requires: Level 65, 114 (unmet) Str, 63 Dex
--------
Item Level: 79
--------
{ Implicit Modifier }
Cannot load or fire Ammunition — Unscalable Value
--------
{ Prefix Modifier "Snapping" (Tier: 8) — Damage, Elemental, Lightning, Attack }
Adds 3(1-3) to 43(31-43) Lightning Damage
{ Prefix Modifier "Glinting" (Tier: 9) — Damage, Physical, Attack }
Adds 3(2-3) to 6(5-7) Physical Damage
{ Suffix Modifier "of Success" (Tier: 8) — Life }
Gain 6(4-6) Life per enemy killed
{ Suffix Modifier "of Anger" (Tier: 5) — Damage, Attack, Critical }
+12(12-13)% to Critical Damage Bonus
